text:
Created attachment 243954
vhs-0.6.0.patch

Description:

* Use pkg-message instead of pkg-post-install script.
* Remove trailing slash in WWW.
* Use a hardcoded string in GO_MODULE instead of ${PORTNAME}.

QA:

* portlint: OK (looks fine.)
* testport: OK (poudriere: 13.2-RELEASE, amd64, CHROMIUM UNGOOGLED_CHROMIUM tested)
